zh.lifeSummary: 當John Sharpe於大約1400年出生在英國艾可可格沙拉爾時，他的父親Henry Sharpe29歲，母親Margaret Tey22歲。他於1421年與Jane Staunton在英國英格蘭艾可可格沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1454年在英國艾可享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Sharpe于大约1400年出生在英国艾可可格沙拉爾时，他的父亲Henry Sharpe29岁，母亲Margaret Tey22岁。他于1421年与Jane Staunton在英国英格兰艾可可格沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1454年在英国艾可享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sharpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sharp
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English sharp(e) ‘sharp, quick, smart, acute, keen-witted’ (Old English scearp).
Irish: when not the English or Scots name in 1 above, an Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Géaráin ‘descendant of Géarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of géar ‘sharp’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Scharf   ‘sharp-cutting’ or of any of several other European names with similar meaning.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Sharpe was born about 1400, in Coggeshall, Essex, England, his father, Henry Sharpe, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Tey, was 22. He married Jane Staunton in 1421, in Coggeshall, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1454, in Essex, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Sharpe est né environ 1400, à Coggeshall, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Sharpe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Tey, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jane Staunton en 1421, à Coggeshall, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1454, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Sharpe um 1400 in Coggeshall, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Sharpe 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Tey 22. Er hat 1421 in Coggeshall, Essex, England, United Kingdom Jane Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1454 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Sharpe è nato il circa 1400 nel Coggeshall, Essex, England, il suo padre, Henry Sharpe, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Tey, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jane Staunton nel 1421, nel Coggeshall, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1454, nel Essex, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.of Maldon, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスマルドン
ja.Coggeshall, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスコグジェシャル
ja.lifeSummary: John Sharpeが約1400年にイギリスエセックスコグジェシャルで生まれた時，父Henry Sharpeは29歳，母Margaret Teyは22歳であった。1421年にイギリスイギリスエセックスコグジェシャルでJane Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1454年にイギリスエセックスで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Sharpe(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 에세스 코그샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Sharpe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Tey(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코그샤에서 Jane Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 영국 에세스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Sharpe nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Sharpe, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Tey, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Staunton em 1421, em Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1454, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Sharpe родился около 1400 г. в местности когешолл, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Sharpe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Tey, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Staunton в 1421 г. в местности когешолл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1454 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Sharpe nació aproximadamente 1400, en Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Sharpe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Tey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jane Staunton en 1421, en Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1454, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
